summary: SAML SSO Integration Testing Complete - 19/19 tests passed. Tested all SAML SSO endpoints including providers listing, SP metadata generation, SAML configuration CRUD, SAML login initiation, ACS endpoint (graceful error handling), SLO endpoint, authorization enforcement, and OAuth regression.

tests: Returns SAML in supported_types
Returns proper provider template structure (azure_ad, okta, google)
Each provider has name, provider, required_fields, instructions
Returns valid XML for existing tenant
Contains EntityDescriptor, SPSSODescriptor, AssertionConsumerService
ACS URL contains correct tenant code path
SLO URL contains correct tenant code path
Returns 404 for non-existent tenant
Super admin can configure SAML SSO (set provider=saml, saml_entity_id, saml_sso_url, saml_certificate)
Test endpoint returns status=ready when SAML properly configured
Test endpoint includes login_url pointing to SAML endpoint
Test endpoint includes saml_metadata_url
Delete endpoint disables SSO
Test endpoint returns status=disabled when SSO not enabled
Returns 307 redirect when SAML configured
Redirect location contains IdP SSO URL
Redirect includes SAMLRequest parameter
Returns 400 when SAML not configured for tenant
No longer returns 501 (placeholder removed)
Missing SAMLResponse returns redirect with error
Invalid SAMLResponse returns redirect with error
Non-existent tenant returns 404
Handles graceful errors with redirect to login
Returns 302/307 redirect to login page
Sets access_token cookie in response (for deletion)
Students (non-admin) get 403 on config endpoints
Tenant admins can access their own tenant config
Tenant admins get 403 when accessing other tenant config
Unauthenticated requests get 401
Returns 400 when OAuth SSO not configured (still works)

critical_code_review_comments: Implementation correctly uses python3-saml library (OneLogin_Saml2_Auth) for assertion validation
SAML AuthnRequest uses deflate-compressed base64 encoding for HTTP-Redirect binding (correct)
User provisioning reuses existing provision_sso_user function (DRY)
JWT token creation uses same create_access_token as OAuth flow (consistent)
Error handling redirects to login with sso_error param (graceful)
SAML config stored in tenant.sso_config MongoDB document (shared with OAuth)
seed_data_creation: Test SAML config created and cleaned up during tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: SAML SSO integration fully tested. Key endpoints: /api/sso/providers, /api/sso/saml/{tenant}/metadata, /api/sso/tenant/{tenant}/config (PUT/DELETE), /api/sso/tenant/{tenant}/test, /api/sso/saml/{tenant}/login (307 redirect), /api/sso/saml/{tenant}/acs (POST with SAMLResponse), /api/sso/saml/{tenant}/slo. Without a real IdP, ACS returns redirect with error for any invalid/missing SAMLResponse - this is expected. python3-saml library (1.16.0) is installed and working.

mocked_apis.note: SAML endpoints are real but without a live IdP the full SAML assertion flow cannot be tested end-to-end
